_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI testing and red-teaming methods, including adversarial testing, edge case construction, distributional shift testing, and structured failure mode analysis.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI RM domain. Knowledge RM-K-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-005 (RM, cosine: 0.491), SP-T-009 (SP, cosine: 0.490).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.519). Shared vocabulary: [knowledge, testing]. NICE-only terms [black, box, software] vs WIDAI-only terms [adversarial, ai, analysis, case, construction, distributional] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.885 (P=0.912, R=0.860). P exceeds R by 0.053 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.1%, N:77.8%, C:22.1%). No dominant classification for "Knowledge of black-box software testing" vs "Knowledge of AI testing and red-teaming methods, including adversarial testing," — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 ≈ STS 0.519 (gap 0.009). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [knowledge, testing] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [knowledge, testing]. NICE-only: [black, box, software]. WIDAI-only: [adversarial, ai, analysis, case, construction, distributional].
